ABOUT
Final year B.Tech student at Pondicherry Engineering College (An Autonomous Institute of Government of
Puducherry and affiliated to Pondicherry University, a Central University under Government of India)
working towards earning a Major degree in Electronics & Communication Engineering with Minor in
Computer Science & Engineering.
OBJECTIVE
Focused and diligent student seeking graduate position in areas related to Data Mining, Data Science,
Natural Language Processing and Machine Learning.
